structs.name: b2MotionLocks
structs.description: / Motion locks to restrict the body movement

structs.name: b2Profile
structs.description: / Profiling data. Times are in milliseconds.

structs.name: b2Counters
structs.description: / Counters that give details of the simulation size.

structs.name: b2JointDef
structs.description: / 2. if you add/remove shapes from a body and recompute the mass, the joints will be broken

structs.name: b2SensorBeginTouchEvent
structs.description: / A begin touch event is generated when a shape starts to overlap a sensor shape.

structs.name: b2SensorEndTouchEvent
structs.description: /     Therefore you should always confirm the shape id is valid using b2Shape_IsValid.

structs.name: b2SensorEvents
structs.description: / Note: these may become invalid if bodies and/or shapes are destroyed

structs.name: b2ContactBeginTouchEvent
structs.description: / A begin touch event is generated when two shapes begin touching.

structs.name: b2ContactEndTouchEvent
structs.description: /     or shape, or changing a filter or body type.

structs.name: b2ContactHitEvent
structs.description: / This may be reported for speculative contacts that have a confirmed impulse.

structs.name: b2ContactEvents
structs.description: / Note: these may become invalid if bodies and/or shapes are destroyed

structs.name: b2BodyMoveEvent
structs.description: / @note If sleeping is disabled all dynamic and kinematic bodies will trigger move events.

structs.name: b2BodyEvents
structs.description: / Note: this data becomes invalid if bodies are destroyed

structs.name: b2JointEvent
structs.description: / The observed forces and torques are not returned for efficiency reasons.

structs.name: b2JointEvents
structs.description: / Note: this data becomes invalid if joints are destroyed
